## Deployment Checklist

### Testing
- [ ] Changes deployed and tested in a **full sandbox**
- [ ] UAT completed and signed off by the business stakeholder
- [ ] No unexpected errors or broken functionality in sandbox

### Documentation
- [ ] `projects/<name>/project-brief.md` is complete
- [ ] `projects/<name>/deployment-log.md` is up to date
- [ ] `projects/<name>/rollback-plan.md` is written

### Readiness
- [ ] All metadata is committed to this branch
- [ ] Rollback plan has been reviewed
- [ ] Stakeholders have been notified of the deployment window
